subject: an armored humanoid figure with long light hair spinning a hooked chain weapon in an open Zendikar landscape
description: A humanoid figure stands in a dynamic pose, one arm raised holding a cord attached to a hooked blade that extends outward in a spin. The figure has long light-colored hair and wears leather-and-metal armor with wraps on the arms. Chains and hooks hang from the belt and wrists. In the background, a large fabric canopy or sail structure and distant floating rock formations suggest the Zendikar landscape. The sky is blue and pale.
foreground: armored humanoid with long light hair spinning a hooked chain, wraps and hooks on wrists
background: fabric canopy structure, blue sky, floating rocks
emotion: determined combat readiness, spinning into battle
